scenario.name: cisco_unsolicited_blf_uac
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];rport;branch=[branch] From: <sip:1010@[remote_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:1010@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER User-Agent: Cisco-CP8865/12.1.1 Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:1010@127.0.0.1:__SIPP_CONTACT_PORT__;transport=tcp>;+sip.instance="<urn:uuid:00000000-0000-0000-0000-aabbccddeeff>" Reason: SIP;cause=200;text="Name=SEPAABBCCDDEEFF ActiveLoad=sip8865.12-1-1-12 InactiveLoad=sip8865.cert-2014" Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];rport;branch=[branch] From: <sip:1010@[remote_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:1010@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER User-Agent: Cisco-CP8865/12.1.1 Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:1010@127.0.0.1:__SIPP_CONTACT_PORT__;transport=tcp>;+sip.instance="<urn:uuid:00000000-0000-0000-0000-aabbccddeeff>" [authentication username=1010 password=ci-no-secret] Reason: SIP;cause=200;text="Name=SEPAABBCCDDEEFF ActiveLoad=sip8865.12-1-1-12 InactiveLoad=sip8865.cert-2014" Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0
